Sections.name: show_hero
Sections.label: Show Hero
Sections.help_text: Display the hero banner on the homepage.

Sections.name: show_featured_product
Sections.label: Show Featured Product
Sections.help_text: Display a single featured product spotlight on the homepage.

Sections.name: show_featured_products
Sections.label: Show Featured Products
Sections.help_text: Display the featured products grid on the homepage.

Sections.name: show_featured_categories
Sections.label: Show Featured Categories
Sections.help_text: Display the featured categories section on the homepage.

Sections.name: show_on_sale
Sections.label: Show On Sale
Sections.help_text: Display a curated on-sale products section with sale badges and discount pricing.

Sections.name: show_promo_banner
Sections.label: Show Promo Banner
Sections.help_text: Display a full-width promotional banner with a heading and call-to-action button.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_image
Hero.label: Hero Image
Hero.help_text: Full-width hero image. Use a high-quality product or lifestyle photo.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_image_mobile
Hero.label: Hero Image (Mobile)
Hero.help_text: Optional mobile-optimized hero image. Falls back to desktop image if not set.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_heading
Hero.label: Hero Heading
Hero.help_text: Large heading text overlaid on the hero image.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_text_color
Hero.label: Hero Text Color
Hero.help_text: Color for text on the hero image. Leave blank for white.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_text_align
Hero.label: Hero Text Alignment
Hero.help_text: Alignment of heading and subheading text on the hero.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_content_position
Hero.label: Content Position
Hero.help_text: Position of the hero copy block over the image.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_content_width
Hero.label: Content Width
Hero.help_text: Maximum width for hero copy on desktop.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_height
Hero.label: Hero Height
Hero.help_text: Minimum height of the hero section.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_overlay_color
Hero.label: Hero Overlay Color
Hero.help_text: Color overlay on the hero image for text readability. Leave blank for no overlay.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_overlay_opacity
Hero.label: Hero Overlay Opacity
Hero.help_text: Opacity of the hero overlay (0 = transparent, 100 = solid).

Hero.name: homepage_hero_alt
Hero.label: Hero Image Alt Text
Hero.help_text: Accessible description of the hero image.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_link
Hero.label: Hero Link URL
Hero.help_text: Where the hero button links to (e.g. /catalogue/).

Hero.name: homepage_hero_cta
Hero.label: Hero Button Text
Hero.help_text: Call-to-action button text. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_cta_outline
Hero.label: Use Outline Button Style
Hero.help_text: Display the hero button as an outline button.

Featured Product.name: featured_product
Featured Product.label: Product
Featured Product.help_text: Select a single product to spotlight on the homepage.

Featured Product.name: featured_product_header
Featured Product.label: Section Heading
Featured Product.help_text: Heading above the featured product. Leave blank to hide.

Featured Product.name: featured_product_header_size
Featured Product.label: Heading Size
Featured Product.help_text: Size of the featured product section heading.

Featured Product.name: featured_product_header_align
Featured Product.label: Heading Alignment
Featured Product.help_text: Alignment of the featured product section heading.

Featured Product.name: featured_product_description
Featured Product.label: Custom Description
Featured Product.help_text: Override the product description with custom text.

Featured Product.name: featured_product_cta_text
Featured Product.label: Button Text
Featured Product.help_text: Call-to-action button text. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Featured Product.name: featured_product_cta_outline
Featured Product.label: Use Outline Button Style
Featured Product.help_text: Display the featured product button as an outline button.

Featured Product.name: featured_product_bg_color
Featured Product.label: Background Color
Featured Product.help_text: Section background color. Leave blank for white.

Featured Products.name: featured_products
Featured Products.label: Products
Featured Products.help_text: Products to feature on the homepage.

Featured Products.name: featured_products_header
Featured Products.label: Section Heading
Featured Products.help_text: Heading above the featured products grid. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Featured Products.name: featured_products_header_size
Featured Products.label: Heading Size
Featured Products.help_text: Size of the featured products heading.

Featured Products.name: featured_products_header_align
Featured Products.label: Heading Alignment
Featured Products.help_text: Alignment of the featured products heading.

Featured Products.name: featured_products_columns
Featured Products.label: Columns (Desktop)
Featured Products.help_text: Number of product columns on desktop.

Featured Products.name: featured_products_bg_color
Featured Products.label: Background Color
Featured Products.help_text: Section background color. Leave blank for white.

Featured Products.name: featured_products_card_bg
Featured Products.label: Card Background Color
Featured Products.help_text: Optional background color for product cards in this section.

Featured Products.name: featured_products_cta_text
Featured Products.label: Button Text
Featured Products.help_text: Optional button text shown below the grid. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Featured Products.name: featured_products_cta_url
Featured Products.label: Button URL
Featured Products.help_text: Optional destination for a button shown below the grid.

Featured Products.name: featured_products_cta_outline
Featured Products.label: Use Outline Button Style
Featured Products.help_text: Display the featured products button as an outline button.

On Sale.name: on_sale_header
On Sale.label: Section Heading
On Sale.help_text: Heading above the on-sale products grid. Leave blank to use the localized default.

On Sale.name: on_sale_header_size
On Sale.label: Heading Size
On Sale.help_text: Size of the on-sale section heading.

On Sale.name: on_sale_header_align
On Sale.label: Heading Alignment
On Sale.help_text: Alignment of the on-sale section heading.

On Sale.name: on_sale_products
On Sale.label: Products
On Sale.help_text: Select products to feature in the On Sale section. Add your discounted products here.

On Sale.name: on_sale_columns
On Sale.label: Columns (Desktop)
On Sale.help_text: Number of product columns on desktop.

On Sale.name: on_sale_bg_color
On Sale.label: Background Color
On Sale.help_text: Section background color. Leave blank for white.

On Sale.name: on_sale_card_bg
On Sale.label: Card Background Color
On Sale.help_text: Optional background color for product cards in this section.

Promo Banner.name: promo_banner_heading
Promo Banner.label: Heading
Promo Banner.help_text: Large heading text on the promo banner.

Promo Banner.name: promo_banner_subheading
Promo Banner.label: Subheading
Promo Banner.help_text: Smaller supporting text below the heading.

Promo Banner.name: promo_banner_cta_text
Promo Banner.label: Button Text
Promo Banner.help_text: Optional button text shown in the promo banner. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Promo Banner.name: promo_banner_bg_color
Promo Banner.label: Background Color
Promo Banner.help_text: Banner background color. Leave blank to use your store's primary color.

Promo Banner.name: promo_banner_text_color
Promo Banner.label: Text Color
Promo Banner.help_text: Banner text and button color. Leave blank for white.

Promo Banner.name: promo_banner_cta_style
Promo Banner.label: Button Color
Promo Banner.help_text: Button color from store branding when outline style is disabled.

Promo Banner.name: promo_banner_cta_outline
Promo Banner.label: Use Outline Button Style
Promo Banner.help_text: Display the promo banner button as an outline button using the banner text color.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories
Featured Categories.label: Categories
Featured Categories.help_text: Categories to feature on the homepage.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories_header
Featured Categories.label: Section Heading
Featured Categories.help_text: Heading above the featured categories. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories_header_size
Featured Categories.label: Heading Size
Featured Categories.help_text: Size of the featured categories heading.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories_header_align
Featured Categories.label: Heading Alignment
Featured Categories.help_text: Alignment of the featured categories heading.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories_columns
Featured Categories.label: Columns (Desktop)
Featured Categories.help_text: Number of category columns on desktop.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories_bg_color
Featured Categories.label: Background Color
Featured Categories.help_text: Section background color. Leave blank for white.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories_overlay_color
Featured Categories.label: Overlay Color
Featured Categories.help_text: Overlay color for category image tiles. Leave blank for black.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories_overlay_opacity
Featured Categories.label: Overlay Opacity
Featured Categories.help_text: Opacity of the category tile overlay.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories_text_color
Featured Categories.label: Text Color
Featured Categories.help_text: Text color for category tile labels. Leave blank for white.

Custom CSS.name: home_page_css
Custom CSS.label: Homepage Custom CSS
Custom CSS.help_text: Add CSS styles that only load on the homepage.

Product Images.name: product_gallery_layout
Product Images.label: Image Gallery Layout
Product Images.help_text: Position of thumbnail navigation on product pages.

Product Images.name: product_media_fit
Product Images.label: Image Display
Product Images.help_text: How product images are displayed in cards and galleries.

Product Information.name: variant_picker
Product Information.label: Variant Picker Style
Product Information.help_text: How product variants (size, color, etc.) are displayed.

Product Information.name: product_description_placement
Product Information.label: Description Layout
Product Information.help_text: Where the product description appears relative to the image gallery.

Product Cards.name: product_card_border
Product Cards.label: Show Product Card Borders
Product Cards.help_text: Add a subtle border around product cards in grids.

Membership Pricing.name: enable_membership_pricing
Membership Pricing.label: Enable Membership Price Presentation
Membership Pricing.help_text: Show member pricing when the logged-in customer metadata matches the configured active member value. Requires a matching checkout discount configured outside the theme.

Membership Pricing.name: membership_discount_percent
Membership Pricing.label: Membership Discount Percent
Membership Pricing.help_text: Percentage discount to present on storefront prices for active members.

Membership Pricing.name: membership_status_metadata_key
Membership Pricing.label: Status Metadata Key
Membership Pricing.help_text: Customer metadata key used to identify active members.

Membership Pricing.name: membership_active_status_value
Membership Pricing.label: Active Status Value
Membership Pricing.help_text: Metadata value that qualifies a logged-in customer for member pricing.

Membership Pricing.name: membership_label
Membership Pricing.label: Member Price Label
Membership Pricing.help_text: Short label shown beside the member price. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Membership Pricing.name: membership_detail_text
Membership Pricing.label: Member Price Detail
Membership Pricing.help_text: Optional detail shown on larger price surfaces. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Product Reviews.name: product_reviews
Product Reviews.label: Enable Product Reviews
Product Reviews.help_text: Show customer reviews on product pages.

Recommended Products.name: show_recommended
Recommended Products.label: Show Recommended Products
Recommended Products.help_text: Display recommended products section on product pages.

Recommended Products.name: recommended_products_header
Recommended Products.label: Section Heading
Recommended Products.help_text: Heading above recommended products. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Recommended Products.name: recommended_products_header_size
Recommended Products.label: Heading Size
Recommended Products.help_text: Size of the recommended products heading.

Recommended Products.name: recommended_products_header_align
Recommended Products.label: Heading Alignment
Recommended Products.help_text: Alignment of the recommended products heading.

Recommended Products.name: recommended_products_columns
Recommended Products.label: Columns (Desktop)
Recommended Products.help_text: Number of recommended product columns on desktop.

Recommended Products.name: recommended_products_bg_color
Recommended Products.label: Background Color
Recommended Products.help_text: Section background color. Leave blank for white.

Recommended Products.name: recommended_products_card_bg
Recommended Products.label: Card Background Color
Recommended Products.help_text: Optional background color for product cards in this section.

Custom CSS.name: product_page_css
Custom CSS.label: Product Page Custom CSS
Custom CSS.help_text: Add CSS styles that only load on product detail pages.

Footer Style.name: footer_bg_color
Footer Style.label: Background Color
Footer Style.help_text: Footer background color. Leave blank for light gray.

Footer Style.name: footer_text_color
Footer Style.label: Text Color
Footer Style.help_text: Footer text color. Leave blank for default.

Footer Style.name: footer_link_color
Footer Style.label: Link Color
Footer Style.help_text: Footer link color. Leave blank for default.

Social Media.name: enable_social
Social Media.label: Show Social Links
Social Media.help_text: Display social media icons in the footer.

Payment Icons.name: pay_icons
Payment Icons.label: Payment Icons
Payment Icons.help_text: Select payment method icons to display in the footer.

Disclaimer.name: site_disclaimer
Disclaimer.label: Site Disclaimer
Disclaimer.help_text: Optional legal disclaimer displayed at the very bottom of the footer.

Fonts.name: font_script
Fonts.label: Custom Font Embed Code
Fonts.help_text: Paste a font embed code (e.g. Google Fonts link tag) to load custom fonts.

Fonts.name: font_body
Fonts.label: Body Font Family
Fonts.help_text: CSS font-family for body text. Leave blank for system font stack.

Fonts.name: font_header
Fonts.label: Heading Font Family
Fonts.help_text: CSS font-family for headings. Leave blank to inherit body font.

General.name: cart_header_title
General.label: Header Title
General.help_text: Title displayed at the top of the side cart. Leave blank to use the localized default.

General.name: sidecart_open_on_add
General.label: Open on Add to Cart
General.help_text: Automatically open the side cart when a product is added.

Rewards Progress.name: enable_progress_bar
Rewards Progress.label: Enable Rewards Progress
Rewards Progress.help_text: Show a progress bar in the side cart for free shipping and free gift rewards.

Rewards Progress.name: usd_goal_1
Rewards Progress.label: Free Shipping Threshold
Rewards Progress.help_text: Cart total required for free shipping.

Rewards Progress.name: usd_goal_2
Rewards Progress.label: Free Gift Threshold
Rewards Progress.help_text: Cart total required for the free gift. Must be higher than the free shipping threshold.

Rewards Progress.name: step_1_message
Rewards Progress.label: Free Shipping Message
Rewards Progress.help_text: Message shown when cart is below the shipping threshold. Use {amount} for the remaining amount. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Rewards Progress.name: step_2_message
Rewards Progress.label: Free Gift Message
Rewards Progress.help_text: Message shown when cart is between shipping and gift thresholds. Use {amount} for the remaining amount. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Rewards Progress.name: final_step_message
Rewards Progress.label: All Rewards Reached Message
Rewards Progress.help_text: Celebration message shown when the cart total exceeds all milestones. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Rewards Progress.name: gift_product
Rewards Progress.label: Free Gift Product
Rewards Progress.help_text: Select a parent product for the free gift. Its first variant will be automatically added to the cart when the gift threshold is reached.

Suggested Products.name: enable_upsells
Suggested Products.label: Enable Suggested Products
Suggested Products.help_text: Show product suggestions in the side cart to encourage additional purchases.

Suggested Products.name: upsell_section_title
Suggested Products.label: Section Title
Suggested Products.help_text: Heading displayed above suggested products in the side cart. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Suggested Products.name: upsell_fallback_slots
Suggested Products.label: Advanced: Fallback Slot Order
Suggested Products.help_text: Advanced fallback order for suggested products. Usually leave as 1,2.

Suggested Products.name: upsell_product_1
Suggested Products.label: Suggested Product 1
Suggested Products.help_text: First product suggestion. Hidden if already in the cart.

Suggested Products.name: upsell_product_2
Suggested Products.label: Suggested Product 2
Suggested Products.help_text: Second product suggestion. Hidden if already in the cart.

Suggested Products.name: upsell_product_3
Suggested Products.label: Suggested Product 3
Suggested Products.help_text: Third product suggestion. Hidden if already in the cart.

Site Settings.name: site_index
Site Settings.label: Disable Search Indexing
Site Settings.help_text: Add noindex, nofollow meta tag to prevent search engines from indexing.

Site Settings.name: account_only
Site Settings.label: Account Only Mode
Site Settings.help_text: Hide navigation and storefront content. Shows only account login.

Site Settings.name: account_only_show_footer
Site Settings.label: Show Footer in Account Only
Site Settings.help_text: Display the footer (contact info, links, payment icons) on the account only screen. Disable for a minimal login-only view.

Custom Code.name: custom_css
Custom Code.label: Custom CSS
Custom Code.help_text: Add custom CSS styles. Warning: custom styles may need updating when the theme is updated.

Main Navigation.name: logo_align
Main Navigation.label: Logo Alignment Desktop
Main Navigation.help_text: Position of the logo on desktop navigation.

Navbar Style.name: navbar_style
Navbar Style.label: Color Scheme
Navbar Style.help_text: Default header color scheme when custom colors are blank.

Navbar Style.name: navbar_bg_color
Navbar Style.label: Navbar Background Color
Navbar Style.help_text: Background color for the header. Leave blank for white.

Navbar Style.name: navbar_link_color
Navbar Style.label: Navbar Link Color
Navbar Style.help_text: Text and icon color for the header. Leave blank for default.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_text
Announcement Bar.label: Announcement Text
Announcement Bar.help_text: Short announcement displayed at the top of the page. Leave blank to hide.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_bg_color
Announcement Bar.label: Background Color
Announcement Bar.help_text: Announcement bar background color. Leave blank for primary color.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_text_color
Announcement Bar.label: Text Color
Announcement Bar.help_text: Announcement bar text color. Leave blank for white.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_link
Announcement Bar.label: Link URL
Announcement Bar.help_text: Optional link URL for the announcement.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_link_text
Announcement Bar.label: Link Text
Announcement Bar.help_text: Text for the announcement link. Leave blank to use the localized default.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_placement
Announcement Bar.label: Show On
Announcement Bar.help_text: Where the announcement bar is displayed.
